site.name: Shiba Coloproctological Clinic
site.tagline: Gastroenterology & proctology clinic in Minato-ku, Tokyo

home.metaTitle: Shiba Coloproctological Clinic | Proctology & Gastroenterology in Tokyo
home.metaDescription: English-speaking gastroenterology and proctology clinic in Shiba, Minato-ku, Tokyo. Treatment for hemorrhoids, anal fissures and fistula, plus gastroenterology and endoscopy. Foreign residents welcome.
home.heroTitle: A specialist clinic for proctology and digestive health you can talk to with confidence
home.heroSubtitle: From hemorrhoid treatment to gastroenterology — careful, professional care in a private, comfortable setting.
home.introBody: Shiba Coloproctological Clinic is a specialist clinic for proctology, anal surgery and gastroenterology located in Shiba, Minato-ku, Tokyo. We treat a wide range of conditions — from hemorrhoids, anal fissures and fistula to digestive complaints and endoscopy.
home.foreignBody: About 40% of our patients are foreign residents in Japan. We provide care in English, so you can be seen without worrying about the language barrier.

director.metaDescription: Meet the director of Shiba Coloproctological Clinic — a board-certified proctologist and surgeon with US medical licensing examination qualification.
director.heading: About the Director
director.name: Director
director.body: Our director is a specialist with many years of experience in proctology and digestive disease. The focus is on each individual patient — clear explanations and appropriate, considered treatment. With clinical experience in the United States, the director also sees patients in English.
qualifications: Board-certified proctologist, Japan Society of Coloproctology
Certified physician in Helicobacter pylori infection
United States Medical Licensing Examination (USMLE) qualification

access.metaDescription: How to reach Shiba Coloproctological Clinic: KT Bldg. 3F, 4-11-5 Shiba, Minato-ku, Tokyo. A short walk from Mita and Tamachi stations.
access.heading: Access
stations: 5 min walk from Mita Station (Toei Mita / Asakusa Line)
7 min walk from Tamachi Station (JR Yamanote / Keihin-Tohoku Line)

services.metaDescription: Proctology (hemorrhoids, anal fissures, fistula), gastroenterology, endoscopy and vaccinations at Shiba Coloproctological Clinic in Tokyo.
services.heading: Services
services.intro: We cover a wide range of care, from anal conditions and gastroenterology to vaccinations.

proctology.title: Proctology
proctology.summary: Diagnosis and treatment of hemorrhoids, anal fissures and fistula.
proctology.body: A specialist examines symptoms such as anal pain, bleeding, swelling and itching. Day surgery is available, and we propose treatment tailored to your symptoms and preferences. Sensitive concerns are handled in a private, considerate setting.
conditions: Swelling or abscess around the anus

vaccines.title: Vaccinations & injections
vaccines.summary: Seasonal influenza and other vaccinations and injections.
vaccines.body: We offer seasonal influenza and other vaccinations, as well as various injections. Please contact us for details.

facility.metaDescription: A clean clinic environment designed with privacy in mind, so you can be seen comfortably and with confidence.
facility.heading: Our Facility
facility.body: We maintain a clean environment designed with privacy in mind so that patients can be seen comfortably. Particular care is taken to put you at ease for sensitive examinations.

price.metaDescription: Guidance on the cost of consultations, examinations and procedures. Japanese health insurance is accepted.
price.heading: Pricing
price.intro: We accept Japanese health insurance. Costs vary depending on the consultation and examinations required.
price.note: Detailed costs are explained during your consultation. Please contact us if you wish to be seen privately (self-pay).

contact.metaDescription: Contact Shiba Coloproctological Clinic by phone or through the online booking form.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: To book an appointment, please use the online booking form or call us.

hours.closedNote: Closed on Thursdays, Sundays and public holidays.

booking.metaTitle: Book an appointment | Shiba Coloproctological Clinic
booking.metaDescription: Book your appointment online. Choose a date and time and fill in your details.
booking.heading: Book an appointment
booking.intro: Choose a date and time and fill in your details. Your booking is received as a request — the clinic will confirm it by email.
booking.noSlots: No openings on this day. Please choose another date.

form.heading: Your details
form.name: Full name
form.consent: Your information is used to confirm and contact you about your booking.

received.heading: Your request has been received
received.body: We have received your booking as a request. The clinic will review it and send you a confirmation by email. Please wait for the confirmation email.

errors.slotTaken: Sorry — this time slot was just booked. Please choose another time.
errors.invalid: Some details are invalid. Please check and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while processing your booking. Please try again shortly.

confirmed.subject: Your appointment is confirmed — Shiba Coloproctological Clinic
confirmed.body: Thank you for your booking. We are pleased to confirm your appointment for the date and time below.
confirmed.closing: We look forward to seeing you. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.

declined.subject: About your appointment request — Shiba Coloproctological Clinic
declined.body: Thank you for your appointment request. We are very sorry, but we are unable to accept your booking for the requested date and time.
declined.closing: Please book again for a different date and time, or contact us by phone. We apologise for the inconvenience.
